creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
New spring menu at the Chef’s Table at the Orangery 🍃

Enjoy farm canapés, English brioche, sea trout that you can season yourself, and even cut your own fresh salad. For the main, there’s delicious Lake District lamb with potatoes, followed by a refreshing dessert with lemon and blueberries 🍧

This unique dining experience is set within their own underground farm, focusing on fresh, local produce, and all dishes are paired with international wines 👨‍🍳

I really enjoyed this concept, and everything tasted fresh and delicious. The space itself is very unique, definitely worth adding to your London bucket list ✨

📍The Orangery, 81 New Oxford Street @theorangerytcr

transcription.text: This might be the coolest fine dining experience in London. Here at the Orangerie you can enjoy a chef's table dinner within its own underground farm. Enjoy canapés, English brioche, sea trout that you can season yourself and even cut your own fresh salad. For the main it's delicious Lake District lamb with potatoes followed by a refreshing dessert with lemon and blueberries. A new spring menu celebrates fresh local produce and all dishes are paired with international wines. Located on New Oxford Street this experience is worth adding to your London bucket list.
